reasons: The program still produces too few clear_domain_chip candidates.
Acceptance rate is high enough to justify a larger intake pass.

agent_rollup.notes: Found a nearby alias to the security-review wedge.

accepted_candidates.label: Vendor Security Review Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Helps teams answer recurring vendor security review requests.
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: turning repeated vendor review work into a reusable advantage
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect controls, draft answers, reuse winning evidence
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Security teams repeatedly answer the same review packets for enterprise buyers.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: Vendor review work repeats across procurement cycles.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: Dental Insurance Appeals AI
accepted_candidates.description: Helps recurring insurance appeal work for dental clinics.
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: improving recurring appeal win-rate for clinics
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: gather denial data, draft appeal, learn from payer responses
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Dental offices repeatedly lose time and cash flow on similar appeals.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: Appeals look like a repeated specialty loop, not a one-off task.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

accepted_candidates.label: HVAC Maintenance Planner AI
accepted_candidates.description: Supports recurring HVAC maintenance planning for field teams.
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: plan maintenance windows and follow-up tasks
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: The work repeats but the mastery layer still needs sharper definition.
classification_reasons: Has specialization intent but not enough mastery definition yet.

merged_candidates.label: Vendor Security Questionnaire Copilot
merged_candidates.description: Handles recurring vendor security questionnaire work.
merged_candidates.user_value_loop: pull prior answers, draft response, update evidence set
merged_candidates.evidence_summary: The same vendor security questions recur with only small changes.
merged_candidates.raw_observation: Questionnaire work repeats across vendor reviews.
classification_reasons: Duplicate of another candidate in the same batch.

rejected_candidates.label: AI Prompt Library
classification_reasons: Does not specify a specialization or mastery surface.
